title: Greek Yogurt / Hung Curd Protein Bowl
description: A five-minute yogurt bowl with chia, walnuts, pumpkin seeds, cinnamon, and fresh fruit.

ingredients.note: optional; avoid sugar or honey if preferred

steps: Add the Greek yogurt or hung curd to a bowl.
Mix in the chia seeds, walnuts, pumpkin seeds, and cinnamon.
Add a small portion of papaya or berries.
Let the bowl rest for five minutes if using chia seeds, then serve.
